run.name: Review PR with Codex
run.display_title: Fix panic in find_reaper_process when parent exits concurrently

head_commit.message:
Replace AVL tree with arena-based red-black tree in EEVDF scheduler

Replace the recursive, Box-based AVL tree in the eligibility queue with
an iterative red-black tree backed by a Vec arena with a free list. This
avoids per-node heap allocations on the scheduler hot path and eliminates
deep recursion in tree operations.
